description_long: This is a well-worn, dark brown cowboy hat with a wide, curved brim and a pinched crown. The brim is asymmetrically shaped, with one side slightly more upturned than the other, giving it a rugged, used appearance. A braided band encircles the base of the crown, adding a subtle decorative touch. The surface of the hat shows visible creases, scuffs, and signs of age, suggesting it has seen extensive use. The material appears to be weathered leather, contributing to its matte, slightly rough finish. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior.
description: A weathered dark brown leather cowboy hat with a wide, curved brim, pinched crown, and braided band, showing signs of heavy use.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the pinched crown, braided band, and the asymmetrically upturned brim.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the wide, curved brim and the hat's low, sloping crown.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the back curve of the brim and the worn texture of the leather.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the braided band and the slightly upturned brim edge.
